Source: bemap-services-v2/traceroute/bemap-traceroute.js

/**
 * BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - TraceRoute (v1.5)
 *
 * Promise-based service that map-matches a GPS trace onto the road network.
 * Two endpoints are exposed:
 *
 *   - `compute(request)`     → POST /routing/1.0/traceroute       (standard)
 *   - `computeRnc(request)`  → POST /routing/1.0/traceroute/rnc   (RNC variant — preserves raw road-network capture)
 *
 * Both return the same shape as `bemap.RoutingV2.calculate()`:
 * a `bemap.RoutingResponse` with one route describing the matched path.
 *
 * In-flight requests are tracked by `requestId` and aborted via `cancel(id)`.
 *
 * @since 1.5.0
 * @public
 * @constructor
 * @extends {bemap.ServiceV2}
 * @param {bemap.Context} context BeMap-JS-API Context. Mandatory.
 * @param {Object} [options]
 */
bemap.TraceRoute = function(context, options) {
    bemap.ServiceV2.call(this, context, options);
    /** @private */
    this._pending = {};
};
bemap.inherits(bemap.TraceRoute, bemap.ServiceV2);

bemap.TraceRoute.prototype._exec = function(path, request, options) {
    if (!(request instanceof bemap.TraceRouteRequest)) {
        return Promise.reject(new bemap.Error({
            code: bemap.Error.ROUTING_FAILED,
            message: 'TraceRoute requires a bemap.TraceRouteRequest'
        }));
    }
    if (!request.destinations.length) {
        return Promise.reject(new bemap.Error({
            code: bemap.Error.ROUTING_FAILED,
            message: 'TraceRoute requires at least one trace point in `destinations`'
        }));
    }
    var opts = options || {};
    var body = request.toJson();
    if (!body.geoserver) body.geoserver = (opts.geoserver || this.ctx.getGeoserver());

    var controller = null;
    if (request.requestId && typeof AbortController === 'function') {
        controller = new AbortController();
        this._pending[request.requestId] = controller;
    }
    var signal = opts.signal || (controller ? controller.signal : undefined);

    var url = path;
    if (request.requestId) url += '?id=' + encodeURIComponent(request.requestId);

    var self = this;
    return this._post(url, body, { signal: signal, headers: opts.headers })
        .then(function(json) {
            if (request.requestId) delete self._pending[request.requestId];
            var resp = bemap.RoutingResponse.fromJson(json);
            if (!resp.requestId && request.requestId) resp.requestId = request.requestId;
            return resp;
        }).catch(function(err) {
            if (request.requestId) delete self._pending[request.requestId];
            throw err;
        });
};

/**
 * Map-match the GPS trace through the standard endpoint
 * `POST service/routing/1.0/traceroute`.
 *
 * @public
 * @param {bemap.TraceRouteRequest} request
 * @param {Object} [options]
 * @return {Promise<bemap.RoutingResponse>}
 */
bemap.TraceRoute.prototype.compute = function(request, options) {
    return this._exec('service/routing/1.0/traceroute', request, options);
};

/**
 * Map-match through the RNC (raw network capture) variant
 * `POST service/routing/1.0/traceroute/rnc`.
 *
 * @public
 * @param {bemap.TraceRouteRequest} request
 * @param {Object} [options]
 * @return {Promise<bemap.RoutingResponse>}
 */
bemap.TraceRoute.prototype.computeRnc = function(request, options) {
    return this._exec('service/routing/1.0/traceroute/rnc', request, options);
};

/**
 * Cancel an in-flight trace.
 *
 * @public
 * @param {String} requestId
 * @return {Boolean}
 */
bemap.TraceRoute.prototype.cancel = function(requestId) {
    var controller = this._pending[requestId];
    if (!controller) return false;
    try { controller.abort(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
    delete this._pending[requestId];
    return true;
};
